title: MCP server.yaml
description: Structure for mcps/<name>/server.yaml. Describes the MCP server's info metadata, tags used for search/categorization, and the network endpoints (servers) hosting the MCP instance.

info.description: OpenAPI-style info block. Overrides exchange.json for display on the MCP detail page.

title.description: Human-readable MCP server title. Shown as the page title on the detail page.

description.description: Long-form description of what the MCP server offers. Rendered in the overview.

version.description: Semantic version of the MCP server (x.y.z).

tags.description: OpenAPI-style tags used by the homepage search to group and filter MCP servers.

description.description: Optional human-readable explanation of what the tag covers.

oneOf.description: Shorthand form: a bare tag name.

servers.description: Network endpoints hosting the MCP server. First entry is the default when rendering the try-it console.

url.description: Absolute URL or templated URL (OAS variable syntax: https://{region}.platform.mulesoft.com).

description.description: Human-readable description of this server (e.g. 'Production', 'EU Region').

default.description: Default value when the template variable is not supplied.

description.description: Explanation of what this variable represents.
